game.name: Hashiwokakero
game.board: Hashiwokakero is played on a rectangular grid. The grid contains islands labeled 1 to 8.
game.pieces: The game relies on bridges that are drawn between the islands. Bridges are straight horizontal or vertical lines, and can be placed as either single or double connections.
game.tomove: A player makes a move by adding or removing a single or double bridge between two horizontally or vertically aligned islands.
game.towin: The puzzle is solved when every island has the exact number of outgoing bridges as labeled, and all islands are interconnected into a single, continuous network.
game.rules: Bridges cannot cross any other bridges or islands.
